query: evaluate my plugin and tell me if it's good enough to share
review my SKILL.md — is the description going to trigger reliably?
I just finished a Claude Code plugin — can you audit it before I publish?
give me feedback on this plugin: what's missing, what's broken, what would you fix
note: Open-ended feedback request on a plugin artifact

query: is this skill ready to ship to the marketplace or does it need more work?
check the quality of this third-party plugin before I install it for my team
I want a structured second opinion on this skill — quality, gaps, anti-patterns
note: Structured-review framing matching workflow's value prop

query: audit my SKILL.md for skill-foundry anti-patterns and tell me what to fix
note: Anti-pattern audit, central to the workflow

query: score this plugin across structure, activation, content, output, and docs
note: Five-dimension scoring matches the workflow's verdict synthesis

query: should I share this skill publicly or keep iterating on it?
build me a new Claude Code plugin from scratch for managing GitHub issues
note: Net-new build request — belongs to build-a-plugin

query: fix the broken hook in my existing skillstack plugin
note: Targeted fix in a known plugin — belongs to update-a-plugin

query: write me a new SKILL.md for code review
note: Authoring a new skill from scratch — belongs to write-your-own-skill

query: my AI agent is producing bad outputs in production — help me improve it
note: Runtime agent quality — belongs to evaluate-and-improve-agent
Single structural check — invoke plugin-validation directly

query: set up trigger evals for my skill
note: Setting up eval infrastructure — invoke plugin-evaluation directly

query: how do I publish a Claude Code plugin to a marketplace?
note: Publishing how-to question, not a quality audit request

query: review this React component for bugs
note: Generic code review — not a plugin/skill artifact
